name: Inon Baasov
title: Senior Product Manager — AI & Enterprise | B.Sc. Engineering | Executive MBA | GenAI Product Specialist
summary: Senior Product Manager with 10+ years of end-to-end product ownership across AI, SaaS, and enterprise platforms. Co-Founder & CPO of TouchE — an AI-powered interactive video platform that raised $2.5M, achieved 99.99% uptime at millions of concurrent users, and delivered 38% team efficiency gains through Agile transformation. Currently advising enterprise AI startups (AiRakoon, Medicrowd) on product strategy, GTM, and adoption frameworks. Proven in bridging the gap between AI/ML research and user-facing product to elevate enterprise efficiency at scale.
key_skills_inline: AI Product Lifecycle | Enterprise SaaS (B2B) | LLM / GenAI Integration | Product-Led Adoption | Agile / Scrum | Stakeholder Management | Data-Driven Roadmaps | Cross-Functional Leadership | KPI Definition

experience.company: Inon Baasov Ltd — Product Strategy Consulting
bullets: Advising AiRakoon (enterprise AI platform) on product strategy, model selection matrix, API usage patterns, pricing (per-token + seat licensing), and 12-month roadmap — enabling closure of first enterprise pilot.
Defined product requirements and adoption KPIs for Medicrowd (AI-enabled MedTech) and Smash+ (consumer AI fitness), focusing on D7/D30 retention and usage-based growth loops.
Built AI feature evaluation frameworks, data governance models, and GTM playbooks for 4 startups across GenAI, FinTech, and HealthTech domains.

experience.company: TouchE TV — AI Interactive Video Platform (SaaS / PaaS)
bullets: Led product from 0→scale: defined vision, hired and managed 4 cross-functional teams, owned $2.5M budget — achieving 99.99% uptime at millions of concurrent users.
Drove 38% team efficiency improvement via full Agile / Scrum transformation across R&D, QA, and Product.
Integrated AI / ML layer across Web, Mobile, and Smart TV SDKs; shipped user-facing features with 24% engagement uplift and 22% quarterly adoption growth.
Closed enterprise partnerships with HOT, Ozon, Eros Now, Paramount, JVP, and Lion's Gate — managing complex multi-stakeholder product rollouts across 4 countries.
Built and shipped: Creator CMS, Viewer SDK, AI Recommendation Engine, Analytics Dashboard, Monetization Engine.

experience.company: Arena Plus Financial Services — FinTech Platform (B2B)
bullets: Owned product roadmap for enterprise FinTech platform: delivered +22% user adoption, +15% revenue growth, −20% time-to-market via structured Agile delivery.
Led cross-functional squads across 3 geographies; managed backlog, sprint ceremonies, and stakeholder reporting to C-suite.
